creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:39:28 2014
New Revision: 355199
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355199
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355199/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189562
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Module-Manifest/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Module-Manifest/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Module-Manifest/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:39:23 2014	(r355198)
+++ head/devel/p5-Module-Manifest/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:39:28 2014	(r355199)
@@ -8,9 +8,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Parse and examine a Perl distribution MANIFEST file
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Params-Util>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Params-Util \
 		p5-Test-Warn>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Test-Warn
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
